items.title: Automation

items.title: Web Applications
items.desc: SaaS, planners, subscription platforms. From data model to production.

items.desc: MVP in 2 weeks: spec → code → production. No bloated estimates, no endless calls.

items.desc: ChatGPT, Claude, Whisper inside your product: chat support, voice, content generation.

items.title: Travel Agency Website

steps.text: Message me on Telegram — plain words are fine
I come back with a plan: solution, timeline, fixed price
I ship the product — you test it live

about.label: 04 // ABOUT
about.title: WHO I AM
about.text: I'm Orik, an AI developer. I build products where AI meets the web: bots, automation, web apps. Working in tandem with AI cuts dev time 3–5× — most projects hit production in 1–2 weeks.
